children.name: clearLexicalPanel clears the lexical panel content
hideTranslation hides the translation for a specific word
scrollUp: should do nothing if at the top and on the first page
words up to word-2 are visible, so the first visible word is the very first one
scrollUp: should scroll up within the same page if not at the top
words from word-2 to word-4 are visible
scrollUp: should load the previous page if at the top and not on the first page
scrollDown: should scroll down within the same page if not at the bottom
should initialize variables based on DOM elements
should return 0 if all words are outside the visible area
